## Checklist

- [ ] `python run_demo.py` prints `7 passed, 0 failed`
- [ ] `python run_demo.py` prints `13 passed, 0 failed`
- [ ] New or changed module is self-contained (`python <file>.py` runs standalone)
- [ ] Docstring at top of any new file explains the concept and real-world analogue
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Relevant `README.md` updated (if module list or architecture changed)
